description: ROW_NUMBER() with PARTITION BY clause returns i64 non-nullable
name: window_partition_by
query_sql:
-- @name PartitionedSales
-- @returns :many
SELECT id, department, amount, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY amount DESC) AS dept_rank FROM sales
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE sales (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, employee_id INTEGER NOT NULL, department TEXT NOT NULL, amount INTEGER NOT NULL, sale_date DATE NOT NULL);
